base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of manhandla_rotate — a character (boss) from 1986 legend of zelda. Manhandla — 4-headed venus-flytrap. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Manhandla — 4-headed venus-flytrap; boss of Level 3 (Manji). 4-frame rotation cycle of the 4 heads around central stalk; each head shoots fireballs. Defeat each head individually
